title: Visual Context Compression
description: Dissertation direction: compressing visual context for VLA inference efficiency.
notes:
Edoardo Ponti's area. Could combine with LoRA/PEFT experience.

## Research Findings (auto-researched Jun 8)

**Key paper: LLaVolta** (NeurIPS 2024) — Progressive visual context compression for MLLMs. Achieves speedups without sacrificing benchmarks.
- arXiv: https://arxiv.org/abs/2406.20092
- GitHub: https://github.com/yaolinli/MLLM-Token-Compression

**Survey**: Comprehensive survey on token/visual compression in MLLMs — covers pruning, merging, resampling, learned compression.

**Significance**: Core problem is MLLMs encode images into hundreds of visual tokens, making long-context reasoning expensive. This attacks that bottleneck directly. Fast-moving area (2024-2025).

title: Google Colab CLI
description: Bridge local terminal to remote Colab GPUs.
notes: Fine-tune models with 5 commands from terminal.

title: Ntsc-rs - Open-Source VHS/Analog TV Effects
description: Rust-based video emulator that adds authentic analog TV and VHS artifacts. Runs in-browser or as a library.
notes: 402 points on HN today. Could be sick for YouTube thumbnails or intro effects - retro VHS vibes without After Effects. Open-source Rust too.

title: InsForge — Open-Source Backend for AI Coding Agents
description: All-in-one backend platform that gives AI agents database, auth, storage, compute, hosting, and an AI gateway through a semantic layer.
notes: Trending #1 on GitHub TypeScript. The idea of a semantic layer between AI agents and infra is smart — could speed up building Lumi or yourtrace if you ever want AI-assisted deploys. Worth a weekend explore.

title: Wave — Voice-to-Text Anywhere on macOS
description: Hold a hotkey, speak, release — speech gets transcribed and processed by AI, local or cloud. #2 on Product Hunt today.
notes: This could be a game-changer for YouTube scripting — talk through your video outline and get text instantly. Also useful for writing commit messages or app copy without touching the keyboard. Free local mode is a nice touch.
